# Pull request

Keep the PR title Conventional-Commit shaped: `feat(scope): summary`.

## Summary

What does this change and why? One or two paragraphs max.

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new user-visible capability
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore / ci
- [ ] breaking change (describe migration below)

## How did you verify this?

- [ ] `make ci-local` passes
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests (`make test-integration`) pass, if relevant
- [ ] Tested the CLI manually against at least one real distro
- [ ] Docker image builds and `docker run` behaves correctly (if Docker changed)

## Breaking changes / migration

Delete this section if not applicable.

## Related issues

`Closes #123`, `Refs #456`.
